classes.reasoning: This is a published research paper in the journal 'Biomed Pap Med Fac Univ Palacky Olomouc Czech Repub.' (2020 Mar; 164(1):43-48) authored by Zidlik et al. It is a review article on tumor infiltrating lymphocytes in melanoma, with full citation metadata, abstract, introduction, references, and acknowledgements characteristic of peer-reviewed medical literature.

summary: This is a peer-reviewed medical journal article published in March 2020 by Biomedical Papers of the Medical Faculty of Palacky University Olomouc. The article is a comprehensive review examining the role of tumor infiltrating lymphocytes (TILs) in malignant melanoma, discussing their prognostic significance, phenotype characterization, and implications for targeted immunotherapy. The document includes standard academic components: abstract, introduction, discussion sections, abbreviations, search strategy, acknowledgements, author contributions, and 55 numbered references.
references_to: grant of Internal Grant Agency, Palacký University, Olomouc, Czech Republic no. IGA UP LF_2019_004
